channel.title: Posts on Hi, I am Sam.
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Hi, I am Sam.
channel.copyright: Built with Hugo and ox-hugo.

item.title: Keeping track of movies with Emacs and Org mode
item.description: Introduction A while back, I decided to start cataloging the movies I’ve seen. This started as a simple table in Emacs Org mode. Below is an example of the table’s structure: | Movie Title | Release year | Genre | Rating | Notes | |-------------+--------------+------------------------------+------------+------------------| | Up | 2009 | Animation, Adventure, Comedy | 8.5 / 10.0 | Lots of balloons | | WALL-E | 2008 | Animation, Adventure, Family | 8.

item.title: Diet Coke Reviews
item.description: Below, I review Diet Coke quality at various restaurants (primarily in the greater Seattle, WA area). Seems like a good use of everyone’s time! McDonalds, USA 🍔 🍟 The gold standard; Diet Coke in its canonical form. Seriously, there is no point in reading the rest of these reviews. Why is it so good? Feed Co., Redmond WA 🍔 Editors note: This restaurant is now "
